request_for_internal_personnel_rules.label: Internal personnel rules or agency practices

request_for_statutorily_protected_record.label: Records protected by a separate nondisclosure statute

request_for_confidential_commercial_or_f.label: Trade secret, confidential commercial, or financial submissions

request_for_contracts_bids_or_procuremen.label: Contracts, bids, proposals, procurement records, vendor submissions, or pricing records

request_for_attorney_client_or_work_prod.label: Attorney-client or attorney work product records

request_targets_personnel_roster_or_file.label: Personnel, medical, or similar private files

request_for_emails_or_correspondence_abo.label: Emails, messages, correspondence, or communications about named people

request_for_financial_regulatory_records.label: Financial institution examination or supervision records

request_for_suspicious_activity_reports_.label: Suspicious Activity Reports, SAR data, Bank Secrecy Act reports, or FinCEN protected reports

request_for_tax_return_or_irs_return_inf.label: Tax returns, IRS return information, taxpayer filings, or forms protected by tax nondisclosure law

request_for_grant_application_or_researc.label: Grant applications, research proposals, peer review files, or scientific proposal records
